FlockArray.Description: Array containing NPCs for this flock type

IsMemory.Description: Defines if the NPC is a memory

MemoriesCategory.Description: Defines the category of the memory

NameTranslationKey.Description: Translation key for NPC name display

AttractiveItemSet.Description: Item to look for in players hand

AttractiveItemSetParticles.Description: The particle system that spawns to indicate the NPC's liked item(s).

IsTameable.Description: Whether this NPC can be tamed.

TameRoleChange.Description: The role the NPC will change into when it is tamed.

CanFollow.Description: Whether command-driven Follow behavior is enabled for this role.

CanHold.Description: Whether command-driven Hold behavior is enabled for this role.

CanRecall.Description: Whether Recall behavior can drive this role into Follow.

CanBreedPair.Description: Whether breeding pair approach behavior is enabled for this role.

NeedsSeekConsumeStartDistance.Description: Distance from trough/source where this critter can begin needs consumption.

NeedsSeekConsumeMaintainMaxDistance.Description: Maximum distance from trough/source this critter should maintain while consuming.

NeedsSeekConsumeMaintainDistanceRange.Description: Distance band this critter should maintain while waiting to consume.
